mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_version (book_id, version_number, modifier_name, change_type, title, author, price, publish_date, description, rollback_from_version) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{versionNumber}, #{modifierName}, #{changeType}, #{title}, #{author}, #{price}, #{publishDate}, #{description}, #{rollbackFromVersion})
mapper.select: SELECT id, book_id, version_number, modifier_name, change_type, title, author, price, publish_date, description, rollback_from_version, created_at FROM book_version WHERE book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY version_number ASC

SELECT id, book_id, version_number, modifier_name, change_type, title, author, price, publish_date, description, rollback_from_version, created_at FROM book_version WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND version_number = #{versionNumber}
SELECT MAX(version_number) FROM book_version WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
